name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Rain before 11pm, then rain and patchy fog between 11pm and 5am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
